name: HumanOptics AG
summary: HumanOptics AG develops, manufactures, and sells intraocular implantable solutions. The company offers artificial intraocular lenses. It also provides CUSTOMFLEX ARTIFICIALIRIS, an iris prosthesis, which is used for the medical and aesthetic reconstruction of eyes with complete or partial aniridia; and implants and accessories. HumanOptics AG serves surgeons and patients. The company is headquartered in Erlangen, Germany. HumanOptics AG is a former subsidiary of Medipart AG.
